description: Validation of income & expenses begins 1 Jan 2026 requiring alignment with eTIMS, withholding tax and customs data.
Adjustment and imposition of excise duty rates under Tax Laws (Amendment) Act 2024.
Amendments to PAYE computation under Tax Laws (Amendment) Act 2024 affecting employer deductions.
Reminder on implementation of Electronic Tax Invoicing for fuel stations.
Automation of Bank Guarantees in iCMS for customs clearance processes.
Roll-out of Automated Payment Plan for managing outstanding tax liabilities.
Guidance on tax exemption on payment of gratuity affecting employment tax compliance.
Adjustment of excise duty rates by Finance Act 2025 impacting filing and payment compliance.
Simplification of PAYE return filing process introducing workflow changes.
Procedure changes for licensing bonded warehouses affecting import compliance.
Fringe Benefit Tax, Deemed Interest Rate and Low Interest Benefit parameter updates.
